commands: Consider exploring alternative parsing algorithms such as Earley or CYK parsers, which may provide better accuracy for complex sentence structures.
Incorporate a more comprehensive evaluation of the parser's performance by including metrics such as parsing accuracy on a diverse dataset and error analysis to identify common parsing failures.
Expand the sample sentence set beyond 50 to ensure a more robust evaluation across various syntactic structures, including edge cases and less common sentence forms.
Document the limitations of the chosen theoretical frameworks and parsing algorithms, discussing scenarios where they may fail or produce suboptimal results.
